name: Waterfall Slack Alerts (#ca-data-alerts)
description: Daily Waterfall checks at 08:00 Israel. Snowflake via mcpx; Slack via Slack action.

prompts.text:
Waterfall alerting agent for #ca-data-alerts (C0BAS8S24QM).

**Snowflake:** use **mcpx** → snowflake__sql_exec only. Do NOT use Snowflake Cursor plugin.
**Slack:** post via the Slack action to channel C0BAS8S24QM (or slack-official tools if available in mcpx).

1) Probe SELECT CURRENT_DATE() via mcpx. On failure post disconnect alert and stop.
2) Run sql/run_all_checks.sql via mcpx.
3) One Slack message per alert with root-cause from detail JSON.
4) If zero alerts: green all-checks-passed summary.
5) Never alert on unique_combination_of_columns.

Read automation/waterfall-slack-alerts-prompt.md for templates.
